segments.text: Hear, my children, the instruction of a father, And give attention to know understanding;
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: For I give you good doctrine: Do not forsake my law.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: When I was my father's son, Tender and the only one in the sight of my mother,
He also taught me, and said to me:
Let your heart retain my words; Keep my commands, and live.
segments.speaker: Solomon's Father

segments.text: Get wisdom! Get understanding! Do not forget, nor turn away from the words of my mouth.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: Do not forsake her, and she will preserve you; Love her, and she will keep you.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: Wisdom is the principal thing; Therefore get wisdom. And in all your getting, get understanding.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: Exalt her, and she will promote you; She will bring you honor, when you embrace her.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: She will place on your head an ornament of grace; A crown of glory she will deliver to you.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: Hear, my son, and receive my sayings, And the years of your life will be many.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: I have taught you in the way of wisdom; I have led you in right paths.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: When you walk, your steps will not be hindered, And when you run, you will not stumble.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: Take firm hold of instruction, do not let go; Keep her, for she is your life.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: Do not enter the path of the wicked, And do not walk in the way of evil.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: Avoid it, do not travel on it; Turn away from it and pass on.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: For they do not sleep unless they have done evil; And their sleep is taken away unless they make someone fall.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: For they eat the bread of wickedness, And drink the wine of violence.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: But the path of the just is like the shining sun, That shines ever brighter unto the perfect day.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: The way of the wicked is like darkness; They do not know what makes them stumble.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: My son, give attention to my words; Incline your ear to my sayings.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: Do not let them depart from your eyes; Keep them in the midst of your heart;
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: For they are life to those who find them, And health to all their flesh.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: Keep your heart with all diligence, For out of it spring the issues of life.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: Put away from you a deceitful mouth, And put perverse lips far from you.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: Let your eyes look straight ahead, And your eyelids look right before you.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: Ponder the path of your feet, And let all your ways be established.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: Do not turn to the right or the left; Remove your foot from evil.
segments.speaker: Solomon
